MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Sabrina Hoang
Attorney Bill Ford appearing for Plaintiff.
Defendant Elena Jackson is present.
Attorney Michelle Lee representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JAN-14-2013 is vacated.
